div.div: You have classes today, papers awaiting marking, and new messages.

div.t-att-style: 'border-top:1px solid var(--border);' if not act_first else ''
'border-top:1px solid var(--border);' if not ue_first else ''

span.t-att-class: 'warn' if ue.get('kind') == 'deadline' else 'info' if ue.get('kind') == 'holiday' else 'accent' if ue.get('kind') == 'today' else ''
'warn' if sheet_state == 'in_progress' else 'success' if sheet_state == 'submitted' else ''

t.t-value: [ {'k': 'Present', 'v': present_count or 0, 'c': 'success'}, {'k': 'Absent', 'v': absent_count or 0, 'c': 'danger'}, {'k': 'Late', 'v': late_count or 0, 'c': 'warn'}, {'k': 'Excused', 'v': excused_count or 0, 'c': 'info'}, {'k': 'Unmarked', 'v': unmarked_count or 0, 'c': ''}, ]

input.placeholder: Find student by name or ID...

div.div: of marksheets entered · avg % · pass rate %

button.t-att-style: 'background:var(--accent-soft);border:1px solid transparent;color:var(--accent-ink);' if ms.get('active') else 'background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--ink);'

'width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;font-family:var(--font-mono);' + ('background:var(--ink);color:var(--ink-inverse);border:1px solid transparent;' if q.get('awarded') == n else 'background:var(--bg-sunk);color:var(--ink-soft);border:1px solid var(--border);')

div.t-att-style: 'border-top:1px solid var(--border);' if not r_first else ''

t.t-foreach: ['Clear reasoning', 'Needs examples', 'Missing citation', 'Partial credit', 'Excellent', 'Review this concept']

textarea.placeholder: Write private feedback — visible to student and parent after you publish.

div.div: Ctrl+Enter to publish · Ctrl+Right for next submission

td.t-att-style: 'background:var(--success-soft);' if sc.get('pct', 0) >= 85 else 'background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--success-soft),transparent 50%);' if sc.get('pct', 0) >= 70 else 'background:var(--warn-soft);' if sc.get('pct', 0) >= 50 else 'background:var(--danger-soft);'

span.t-att-class: 'success' if row.get('pct', 0) >= 70 else 'warn' if row.get('pct', 0) >= 50 else 'danger'

div.t-att-style: 'position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:' + str(sc.get('pct', 0)) + '%;background:' + ('var(--success)' if sc.get('pct', 0) >= 70 else 'var(--warn)' if sc.get('pct', 0) >= 50 else 'var(--danger)') + ';opacity:0.6;'

'max-width:74%;align-self:' + ('flex-end' if t_msg.get('is_me') else 'flex-start') + ';background:' + ('var(--accent)' if t_msg.get('is_me') else 'var(--bg-sunk)') + ';color:' + ('white' if t_msg.get('is_me') else 'var(--ink)') + ';padding:10px 14px;border-radius:14px;font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.5;' + ('border-bottom-right-radius:4px;' if t_msg.get('is_me') else 'border-bottom-left-radius:4px;')

div.div: Post updates to your courses · recent posts
Students and (optionally) parents will be notified

div.t-att-style: 'border-top:1px solid var(--border);' if not ue_first else ''

span.t-att-class: 'warn' if ue.get('kind') == 'deadline' else 'info' if ue.get('kind') == 'holiday' else 'accent' if ue.get('kind') == 'today' else ''

div.t-att-style: 'border-top:1px solid var(--border);' if not ac_first else ''

div.div: Private observations · visible to student, parent, and admin
Keep notes brief, specific, and factual
Balanced ratios (>2:1 praise:concern) correlate with better engagement. You're at this month.
Visibility across your courses · Payments managed by Finance

t.t-foreach: [('Cleared', fees_cleared_students or 0, 'success'), ('Partial payment', fees_partial_students or 0, 'warn'), ('Overdue', fees_overdue_students or 0, 'danger')]

div.div: Note: you cannot process payments directly. Contact the Finance office for payment-related queries.
Your courses · may affect exam eligibility
CA marks submission due · students · drafts ready

span.t-att-class: 'success' if rs.get('avg', 0) >= 70 else 'warn' if rs.get('avg', 0) >= 50 else 'danger'
